resource.name: sessions/13158857315563684801
resource.title: Switching from API to IPC
resource.prompt: ok i gave up on api, can you fully switch to ipc?

gitPatch.suggestedCommitMessage:
Refactor session and sdk layers to fully utilize IPC directly, removing HTTP API layer dependencies.

1. Implement `src/api/sdk.ts` to forward `@google/jules-sdk` interface to IPC via the `window.electron.sdkIpc` bridge.
2. Implement `src/store/app.ts` as a robust Zustand store to observe and cache long-lived streaming IPC activities.
3. Replace Websocket hooks `use-session-ws` with a simplified hook that reads stream data connected from the Store state.
4. Correct type conflicts in `Activity` unions to successfully align components with `@google/jules-sdk` types, improving safety.
5. Update `vitest` config by ensuring test files correctly use `vi.fn()` instead of outdated `jest` artifacts.

pullRequest.title: Migrate Jules Web SDK integration to Electron IPC via Zustand Store
pullRequest.description:
This pull request eliminates the remaining HTTP API layer interactions, fully relying on Electron IPC to manage `@google/jules-sdk` sessions. It introduces a Zustand store to handle streaming sessions cleanly and updates all routes. Additionally, vitest test suites are resolved by swapping legacy jest implementations with the Vitest API.

---
*PR created automatically by Jules for task [13158857315563684801](https://jules.google.com/task/13158857315563684801) started by @A517-AB*
